The project is a solid MuJoCo‑based simulation setup with a clear scene‑asset structure, reusable utility modules, and a ready‑to‑run web interface. It already includes several example XML scenes and a full set of mesh assets, which makes extending or testing new robots straightforward. If you have specific goals—adding a robot, tweaking physics parameters, or cleaning up assets—I can help you with the exact changes you need.
